vocab.meaning: kiểu dáng hình bóng thon gọn, mượt mà
vocab.example: I am particularly fond of modern sedans that boast a streamlined silhouette, as they look both elegant and sophisticated on the road.

vocab.meaning: các tính năng an toàn hiện đại nhất
vocab.example: When choosing a car, I lean towards family-oriented SUVs equipped with state-of-the-art safety features to ensure peace of mind during long trips.

vocab.meaning: khả năng điều khiển linh hoạt/nhạy bén
vocab.example: I've always had a soft spot for compact hatchbacks because of their nimble handling, which makes navigating through congested city streets a breeze.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp mang tính thực dụng/tiện lợi
vocab.example: I actually prefer pickup trucks with a rugged, utilitarian aesthetic over flashy luxury cars because they are built for durability and hard work.

vocab.meaning: sự thoải mái vô song/không đối thủ
vocab.example: Luxury limousines provide an unrivaled comfort that transforms even the most tedious journey into a relaxing experience.
